debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
⊢ |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|

proof:
have h1 : g' 0 = ∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x := by
      simp [g', interpolated_deriv]
      <;> simp_all [interpolator, E]
      <;> congr 1 <;> funext t <;> simp [smul_smul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [E]
      <;> rfl
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : (∑ i : Fin n, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x) = ∑ i : Fin n, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x := rfl
    rw [h2]
    calc
      |∑ i : Fin n, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| := by
        exact Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ = ∑ i : Fin n, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro i _
        rw [abs_mul]
      _ ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro i _
        have h3 : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by
          have h4 : |x i - y i| ≤ ε := hdiff i
          have h5 : |y i - x i| = |x i - y i| := by
            rw [abs_sub_comm]
          rw [h5]
          exact h4
        have h6 : 0 ≤ |nth_partial i f x| := abs_nonneg _
        have h7 : 0 ≤ ε := by linarith
        nlinarith
      _ = ε * ∑ i : Fin n, |nth_partial i f x| := by
        simp [Finset.mul_sum]
        <;> ring_nf
  <;> try norm_num  <;> try linarith
failed_attempts:

      <;>

      field_simp
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [add_smul, sub_smul, mul_smul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : |∑ i : Fin n, (y i - x i) * (nth_partial i f x)| ≤ ε * ∑ i : Fin n, |nth_partial i f x| := by
      calc
        |∑ i : Fin n, (y i - x i) * (nth_partial i f x)| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, |(y i - x i) * (nth_partial i f x)| := by
          -- Use the fact that the absolute value of the sum is less than or equal to the sum of absolute values
          exact Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ = ∑ i : Fin n, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by
          -- Use the property of absolute values for products
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro i _
          rw [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
          -- Use the given condition |x i - y i| ≤ ε
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          have h3 : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by
            have h4 := hdiff i
            -- Use the given condition |x i - y i| ≤ ε and the fact that |y i - x i| = |x i - y i|
            have h5 : |x i - y i| = |y i - x i| := by
              rw [abs_sub_comm]
            linarith
          have h6 : |nth_partial i f x| ≥ 0 := by positivity
          have h7 : |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| ≤ ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
            nlinarith
          exact h7
        _ = ε * ∑ i : Fin n, |nth_partial i f x| := by
          -- Factor out ε from the sum
          rw [Finset.mul_sum]
          <;>
          simp [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          simp_all [Finset.sum_mul, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
          <;>
          linarith
    -- Use the bound to conclude the proof
    exact h2
  sorry
